fields.name: Deviled Eggs
fields.description: A classic creamy finger-food often topped with paprika or bacon.
fields.ingredients:
6-12 large eggs
Mayonnaise 1/4 to 1/2 cup
Mustard yellow or Dijon 1-2 tsp
Salt and Pepper
Paprika for garnish
fields.steps:
Boil eggs for 10-20 min then cool in an ice bath before peeling and halving lengthwise.
Scoop out the yolks and mash with mayonnaise mustard salt and pepper until smooth.
Spoon or pipe the mixture back into the egg white hollows and sprinkle with paprika.

fields.name: Spinach Artichoke Dip
fields.description: A warm cheesy and reliable crowd-pleaser often served with chips or bread.
fields.ingredients:
10 oz frozen chopped spinach
14 oz can artichoke hearts
8 oz cream cheese
1/2 cup sour cream or Greek yogurt
1/2 cup mayonnaise
1 cup shredded mozzarella
1/2 cup grated Parmesan
Garlic 1 tsp minced or powder
fields.steps:
Combine softened cream cheese sour cream and mayonnaise with chopped spinach and drained artichoke hearts.
Stir in shredded mozzarella and Parmesan then season with garlic powder and red pepper flakes.
Bake at 350F for about 25 min until the cheese is bubbly and lightly browned on top.

fields.name: Chicken Wings
fields.description: Crispy baked wings tossed in a buttery hot sauce.
fields.ingredients:
2-3 lbs chicken wings
1/2 cup Buffalo hot sauce
1/4 to 1/2 cup unsalted butter
Garlic powder 1/2 to 1 tsp
Salt and Pepper
fields.steps:
Pat chicken wings dry and bake on a wire rack at 425F for about 45-60 min turning halfway through for even crisping.
While they bake whisk together melted butter and hot sauce in a large bowl.
Once the wings are cooked and crispy toss them in the sauce until fully coated.

fields.name: Jalapeno Poppers
fields.description: Spicy creamy and fried or baked cheese-filled peppers.
fields.ingredients:
10-12 fresh jalapenos halved and seeded
8 oz cream cheese
1 cup shredded cheese
10-12 slices of bacon optional
Panko breadcrumbs optional
fields.steps:
Slice fresh jalapenos in half lengthwise and remove the seeds and membranes to control the heat.
Fill each half with a mixture of cream cheese and shredded cheddar then top with breadcrumbs or wrap in a half-slice of bacon.
Bake at 400F for 15-20 min until the peppers are tender and the topping is golden.

fields.name: Stuffed Mushrooms
fields.description: Bite-sized savory mushroom caps filled with an herb and cheese breadcrumb mixture.
fields.ingredients:
1 lb large white or cremini mushrooms
1/2 cup breadcrumbs
1/4 cup grated Parmesan cheese
2 cloves garlic minced
2 tbsp butter or olive oil
fields.steps:
Remove the stems from large mushrooms and finely chop the stems.
Saute the chopped stems with garlic and herbs then mix with breadcrumbs and Parmesan cheese.
Fill the mushroom caps with the mixture and bake at 375F for 20 minutes until the caps are tender and the stuffing is browned.

fields.name: Crostini
fields.description: Toasted bread topped with tomatoes herbs or cheese.
fields.ingredients:
1 baguette sliced and toasted
4-6 Roma tomatoes diced
Fresh basil leaves chopped
2 cloves garlic minced
Extra virgin olive oil
Balsamic glaze
fields.steps:
Dice fresh tomatoes and toss them with minced garlic chopped basil balsamic vinegar and olive oil then let the mixture sit for at least 15 minutes to meld flavors.
Slice a baguette into rounds brush them with olive oil and toast them in the oven until golden.
Spoon the tomato mixture onto the warm bread just before serving to keep it crisp.

fields.name: Charcuterie Board
fields.description: Curated boards of cheeses meats crackers and fruits that allow for easy customization.
fields.ingredients:
Assorted cured meats salami prosciutto
Various cheeses brie sharp cheddar gouda
Crackers or sliced baguette
Fresh fruits grapes berries apple slices
Nuts olives or jam
fields.steps:
Start by placing small bowls for jams olives or nuts on a large wooden board or platter.
Arrange a variety of sliced meats like prosciutto or salami alongside assorted cheeses like brie cheddar and gouda.
Fill in the remaining spaces with crackers fresh fruit like grapes or berries and sprigs of herbs for a decorative touch.

fields.name: Sliders
fields.description: Miniature sandwiches such as ham and cheese that can be made in bulk.
fields.ingredients:
1 pack 12 count dinner rolls
1/2 lb deli meat ham or turkey
1/2 lb sliced cheese Swiss or provolone
Melted butter with garlic powder and poppy seeds for the glaze
fields.steps:
Slice a pack of dinner rolls in half horizontally without separating the individual buns and place the bottom half in a baking dish.
Layer on deli meats like ham and slices of cheese then replace the top half of the rolls.
Brush the tops with melted butter seasoned with garlic or poppy seeds and bake at 350F for 15-20 minutes until the cheese is melted.

fields.name: Shrimp Cocktail
fields.description: Sophisticated refreshing and protein-rich starter that has remained a party staple for decades.
fields.ingredients:
1 lb large shrimp peeled and deveined tails left on
1 cup ketchup
1-3 tbsp prepared horseradish
1 tbsp lemon juice freshly squeezed
1 tsp Worcestershire sauce
Water lemon slices bay leaves salt and black peppercorns for poaching
fields.steps:
Bring a pot of water to a boil with the lemon slices bay leaves salt and peppercorns.
Add the shrimp and poach them gently for about 3-5 minutes until they turn pink and opaque.
Immediately transfer the cooked shrimp to an ice bath to stop the cooking.
For the cocktail sauce whisk together the ketchup horseradish lemon juice and Worcestershire sauce.
Chill both the shrimp and sauce for at least an hour before serving.

fields.name: Beef Steak
fields.description: A juicy perfectly seared steak with a golden crust and tender center.
fields.ingredients:
2 ribeye or sirloin steaks
2 tbsp olive oil
3 cloves garlic
2 tbsp butter
Fresh rosemary and thyme
Salt and black pepper
fields.steps:
Take steaks out of the fridge 30 minutes before cooking and season generously with salt and pepper.
Heat a cast iron skillet over high heat and add olive oil.
Sear steaks for 3-4 minutes per side for medium rare then add butter garlic and herbs and baste for 1 minute.
Rest the steaks for 5 minutes before slicing and serving.

fields.name: Beef Tacos
fields.description: Seasoned ground beef in warm tortillas topped with fresh salsa and cheese.
fields.ingredients:
1 lb ground beef
1 packet taco seasoning
8 small corn or flour tortillas
1 cup shredded cheddar cheese
1 cup salsa
1 cup shredded lettuce
1 avocado sliced
fields.steps:
Cook ground beef in a skillet over medium heat breaking it apart until browned then drain excess fat.
Stir in taco seasoning and 1/4 cup water and simmer for 3 minutes.
Warm tortillas in a dry pan then fill with beef and top with cheese lettuce salsa and avocado.

fields.name: Beef Stew
fields.description: A hearty slow-cooked stew with tender beef chunks and root vegetables.
fields.ingredients:
2 lbs beef chuck cut into chunks
3 carrots chopped
3 potatoes cubed
2 stalks celery chopped
1 onion diced
2 cups beef broth
2 tbsp tomato paste
Salt pepper and thyme
fields.steps:
Season beef chunks with salt and pepper then brown in batches in a heavy pot with oil.
Add onion celery and tomato paste and cook for 2 minutes.
Add broth carrots and potatoes then bring to a boil.
Reduce heat and simmer covered for 1.5 to 2 hours until beef is fork tender.

fields.name: Fried Chicken
fields.description: Crispy golden fried chicken with a perfectly seasoned crust.
fields.ingredients:
3 lbs chicken pieces
2 cups buttermilk
2 cups all-purpose flour
1 tsp paprika
1 tsp garlic powder
1 tsp onion powder
Salt and pepper
Oil for frying
fields.steps:
Marinate chicken in buttermilk and salt for at least 2 hours or overnight in the fridge.
Mix flour with paprika garlic powder onion powder salt and pepper.
Dredge each piece in the flour mixture shaking off excess.
Fry in oil at 350F for 15-18 minutes turning once until golden and cooked through.

fields.name: Chicken Curry
fields.description: A rich and aromatic curry with tender chicken in a spiced tomato sauce.
fields.ingredients:
1.5 lbs chicken breast or thighs cubed
1 onion diced
3 cloves garlic minced
1 inch ginger grated
1 can diced tomatoes
1 can coconut milk
2 tbsp curry powder
1 tsp cumin
Salt and oil
fields.steps:
Saute onion in oil until golden then add garlic ginger and spices and cook for 1 minute.
Add chicken pieces and brown on all sides.
Stir in diced tomatoes and coconut milk then simmer for 20-25 minutes until chicken is cooked through and sauce has thickened.

fields.name: Grilled Chicken
fields.description: Simple herb-marinated grilled chicken with a smoky char.
fields.ingredients:
4 chicken breasts
3 tbsp olive oil
2 cloves garlic minced
1 tsp dried oregano
1 tsp paprika
Juice of 1 lemon
Salt and pepper
fields.steps:
Mix olive oil garlic oregano paprika lemon juice salt and pepper to make the marinade.
Coat chicken breasts in the marinade and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes.
Grill over medium-high heat for 6-7 minutes per side until cooked through with nice grill marks.
Rest for 5 minutes before serving.

fields.name: Spaghetti Carbonara
fields.description: A classic Roman pasta with eggs pancetta and Parmesan in a silky sauce.
fields.ingredients:
400g spaghetti
200g pancetta or guanciale
4 egg yolks
1 whole egg
100g Pecorino or Parmesan grated
Black pepper
Salt
fields.steps:
Cook spaghetti in well-salted boiling water until al dente reserving 1 cup of pasta water.
Fry pancetta in a pan until crispy then remove from heat.
Whisk egg yolks whole egg and cheese with generous black pepper in a bowl.
Toss hot pasta with pancetta then add egg mixture off the heat stirring quickly and adding pasta water to create a creamy sauce.

fields.name: Pasta Pesto
fields.description: Fresh basil pesto tossed with pasta for a vibrant quick dinner.
fields.ingredients:
400g pasta of your choice
2 cups fresh basil leaves
1/3 cup pine nuts
2 cloves garlic
1/2 cup Parmesan grated
1/2 cup extra virgin olive oil
Salt and pepper
fields.steps:
Blend basil pine nuts garlic and Parmesan in a food processor while slowly adding olive oil until smooth.
Season with salt and pepper.
Cook pasta until al dente then drain reserving some pasta water.
Toss pasta with pesto adding a splash of pasta water to loosen the sauce.

fields.name: Lasagna
fields.description: Layers of pasta meat sauce and creamy bechamel baked to perfection.
fields.ingredients:
12 lasagna sheets
500g ground beef
1 jar marinara sauce
2 cups bechamel sauce
2 cups mozzarella shredded
1/2 cup Parmesan
1 onion diced
2 cloves garlic
fields.steps:
Brown ground beef with onion and garlic then mix with marinara sauce.
Spread a layer of meat sauce in a baking dish then add lasagna sheets bechamel and mozzarella.
Repeat layers ending with bechamel and Parmesan on top.
Cover with foil and bake at 375F for 45 minutes then uncover and bake 15 more minutes until golden.

fields.name: Grilled Salmon
fields.description: Perfectly grilled salmon fillet with a lemon herb glaze.
fields.ingredients:
4 salmon fillets
2 tbsp olive oil
2 cloves garlic minced
Juice of 1 lemon
1 tsp dill
Salt and pepper
fields.steps:
Mix olive oil garlic lemon juice dill salt and pepper.
Brush salmon fillets with the mixture.
Grill skin-side down over medium-high heat for 4-5 minutes then flip and cook 3-4 more minutes.
Serve immediately with lemon wedges.

fields.name: Shrimp Pasta
fields.description: Garlic butter shrimp tossed with pasta in a light white wine sauce.
fields.ingredients:
400g linguine or spaghetti
1 lb large shrimp peeled and deveined
4 cloves garlic minced
4 tbsp butter
1/2 cup white wine
Juice of 1 lemon
Fresh parsley
Red pepper flakes
fields.steps:
Cook pasta until al dente then drain.
Saute garlic in butter then add shrimp and cook 2 minutes per side.
Add white wine and lemon juice and simmer 2 minutes.
Toss with pasta and parsley and serve immediately.

fields.name: Fish Curry
fields.description: A fragrant coconut-based curry with flaky white fish.
fields.ingredients:
1.5 lbs white fish fillets cod or tilapia
1 can coconut milk
1 onion diced
3 cloves garlic
1 tbsp curry paste
1 can diced tomatoes
Fresh cilantro
Salt and oil
fields.steps:
Saute onion and garlic in oil until softened then add curry paste and cook 1 minute.
Add coconut milk and diced tomatoes and bring to a simmer.
Add fish fillets and cook gently for 8-10 minutes until fish is flaky.
Garnish with fresh cilantro and serve with rice.

fields.name: Burger
fields.description: A juicy homemade beef burger with all the classic toppings.
fields.ingredients:
500g ground beef 80/20
4 burger buns
4 slices cheddar cheese
Lettuce tomato onion
Ketchup mustard mayo
Salt and pepper
fields.steps:
Mix ground beef with salt and pepper and form into 4 patties.
Grill or pan-fry over high heat for 3-4 minutes per side.
Add cheese in the last minute to melt.
Toast buns and assemble with your preferred toppings.

fields.name: French Fries
fields.description: Crispy golden fries seasoned with salt — a universal favourite.
fields.ingredients:
4 large russet potatoes
Oil for frying
Salt
Optional paprika or garlic powder
fields.steps:
Peel and cut potatoes into even sticks then soak in cold water for 30 minutes and pat dry.
Fry in oil at 325F for 5-6 minutes to cook through then remove and let cool.
Raise oil temperature to 375F and fry again for 2-3 minutes until golden and crispy.
Drain on paper towels and season with salt immediately.

fields.name: Pizza
fields.description: Homemade pizza with a crispy crust tangy tomato sauce and melted cheese.
fields.ingredients:
Pizza dough 1 ball
1/2 cup pizza sauce
1.5 cups mozzarella shredded
Toppings of your choice
Olive oil
Dried oregano
fields.steps:
Preheat oven to 475F with a pizza stone or baking sheet inside.
Stretch dough on a floured surface to your desired size.
Spread sauce then add cheese and toppings.
Bake for 10-12 minutes until the crust is golden and cheese is bubbly.

fields.name: Veggie Stir-Fry
fields.description: A colourful quick stir-fry of fresh vegetables in a savoury sauce.
fields.ingredients:
1 bell pepper sliced
1 cup broccoli florets
1 carrot julienned
1 cup snap peas
3 cloves garlic
3 tbsp soy sauce
1 tbsp sesame oil
1 tbsp cornstarch
Oil for cooking
fields.steps:
Mix soy sauce sesame oil and cornstarch in a small bowl to make the sauce.
Heat oil in a wok over high heat and stir-fry vegetables for 4-5 minutes until tender-crisp.
Add garlic and cook 30 seconds then pour in the sauce and toss until everything is coated.
Serve over steamed rice.

fields.name: Vegetable Curry
fields.description: A hearty and aromatic curry packed with seasonal vegetables.
fields.ingredients:
1 cup chickpeas cooked
1 cup diced potatoes
1 cup spinach
1 can diced tomatoes
1 can coconut milk
1 onion diced
2 tbsp curry powder
2 cloves garlic
Salt and oil
fields.steps:
Saute onion and garlic in oil until golden then add curry powder and cook 1 minute.
Add potatoes diced tomatoes and coconut milk and simmer 15 minutes.
Stir in chickpeas and spinach and cook 5 more minutes.
Adjust seasoning and serve with naan or rice.

fields.name: Quinoa Salad
fields.description: A fresh and filling salad with quinoa cucumber tomato and lemon dressing.
fields.ingredients:
1 cup quinoa
1 cucumber diced
1 cup cherry tomatoes halved
1/4 cup red onion diced
Fresh parsley and mint
Juice of 2 lemons
3 tbsp olive oil
Salt and pepper
fields.steps:
Cook quinoa in 2 cups of water until absorbed about 15 minutes then let cool.
Combine quinoa with cucumber cherry tomatoes red onion parsley and mint.
Whisk lemon juice and olive oil together and pour over the salad.
Toss well season with salt and pepper and refrigerate for 30 minutes before serving.

fields.name: Grilled Salmon and Avocado
fields.description: A nutritious combination of omega-rich grilled salmon with creamy avocado.
fields.ingredients:
2 salmon fillets
1 ripe avocado sliced
1 tbsp olive oil
Juice of 1 lime
1 tsp cumin
Salt and pepper
Fresh cilantro
fields.steps:
Season salmon with olive oil cumin salt and pepper.
Grill over medium-high heat for 4-5 minutes per side until cooked through.
Slice avocado and drizzle with lime juice.
Serve salmon alongside avocado slices and garnish with fresh cilantro.

fields.name: Quinoa Buddha Bowl
fields.description: A nourishing bowl of quinoa roasted vegetables and tahini dressing.
fields.ingredients:
1 cup quinoa cooked
1 cup roasted chickpeas
1 cup roasted sweet potato cubes
1 cup kale or spinach
1/2 avocado sliced
3 tbsp tahini
Juice of 1 lemon
1 tbsp water to thin
fields.steps:
Cook quinoa and let cool slightly.
Roast chickpeas and sweet potato at 400F with olive oil and salt for 25 minutes.
Whisk tahini lemon juice and water to make the dressing.
Assemble bowls with quinoa then arrange vegetables chickpeas and avocado on top.
Drizzle with tahini dressing.

fields.name: Lemon Herb Chicken
fields.description: Light and flavourful oven-baked chicken with fresh herbs and lemon.
fields.ingredients:
4 chicken breasts
Juice and zest of 2 lemons
3 cloves garlic minced
2 tbsp olive oil
1 tsp dried thyme
1 tsp dried rosemary
Salt and pepper
fields.steps:
Mix lemon juice lemon zest garlic olive oil thyme rosemary salt and pepper.
Marinate chicken in the mixture for at least 1 hour.
Bake at 400F for 22-25 minutes until internal temperature reaches 165F.
Rest 5 minutes before serving.

fields.name: Zucchini Noodles
fields.description: Low-carb zucchini noodles with a light tomato and basil sauce.
fields.ingredients:
4 medium zucchinis spiralized
2 cups cherry tomatoes halved
3 cloves garlic minced
2 tbsp olive oil
Fresh basil
Salt and pepper
Parmesan optional
fields.steps:
Spiralize zucchini into noodles and pat dry with paper towels.
Saute garlic in olive oil for 1 minute then add cherry tomatoes and cook until they begin to burst.
Add zucchini noodles and toss for 2-3 minutes until just tender.
Season with salt and pepper and top with fresh basil.

fields.name: Classic French Baguette
fields.description: A traditional crusty French baguette with a light airy interior.
fields.ingredients:
500g bread flour
350ml warm water
7g instant yeast
10g salt
fields.steps:
Mix flour yeast and salt then gradually add water and knead for 10 minutes until smooth.
Let rise in a warm place for 1 hour until doubled.
Shape into long baguettes and let proof for 45 minutes.
Score the tops with a sharp knife and bake at 450F with steam for 20-25 minutes until golden.

fields.name: Natural Sourdough
fields.description: A tangy naturally leavened sourdough loaf with a chewy crumb.
fields.ingredients:
450g bread flour
50g whole wheat flour
375ml water
100g active sourdough starter
10g salt
fields.steps:
Mix flours water and starter then rest for 30 minutes.
Add salt and perform stretch and fold every 30 minutes for 2 hours.
Shape into a round loaf and refrigerate overnight in a floured banneton.
Bake in a Dutch oven at 500F for 20 minutes covered then 25 minutes uncovered.

fields.name: Herbed Focaccia
fields.description: A fluffy dimpled Italian flatbread drizzled with olive oil and herbs.
fields.ingredients:
500g bread flour
375ml warm water
7g instant yeast
10g salt
4 tbsp olive oil
Rosemary and flaky sea salt for topping
fields.steps:
Mix flour yeast salt water and 2 tbsp olive oil then knead briefly.
Let rise for 1 hour then press into an oiled baking pan.
Dimple the surface with your fingers and drizzle with remaining olive oil.
Top with rosemary and sea salt and bake at 425F for 20-25 minutes until golden.

fields.name: Butter Croissant
fields.description: Flaky buttery croissants with hundreds of delicate layers.
fields.ingredients:
500g bread flour
300ml cold milk
10g instant yeast
10g salt
50g sugar
250g cold butter for laminating
fields.steps:
Make the dough by mixing flour yeast salt sugar and milk then refrigerate overnight.
Encase the cold butter in the dough and perform 3 sets of letter folds chilling 30 minutes between each.
Roll out cut into triangles and roll into croissant shapes then proof for 2-3 hours.
Brush with egg wash and bake at 400F for 18-20 minutes until deep golden.

fields.name: Pain au Chocolat
fields.description: Buttery laminated pastry wrapped around dark chocolate batons.
fields.ingredients:
500g bread flour
300ml cold milk
10g instant yeast
10g salt
50g sugar
250g cold butter for laminating
16 dark chocolate batons
fields.steps:
Prepare croissant dough and laminate with butter through 3 sets of folds.
Roll out and cut into rectangles.
Place a chocolate baton at one end of each rectangle and roll up tightly.
Proof for 2-3 hours brush with egg wash and bake at 400F for 18-20 minutes.

fields.name: Strawberry Custard Danish
fields.description: Flaky pastry filled with vanilla custard and topped with fresh strawberries.
fields.ingredients:
500g puff pastry or croissant dough
1 cup pastry cream
1 cup fresh strawberries sliced
2 tbsp apricot jam for glaze
Powdered sugar for dusting
fields.steps:
Roll out dough and cut into squares then fold up the edges to form a border.
Spoon pastry cream into the centre of each square.
Bake at 375F for 18-20 minutes until golden.
Top with fresh strawberry slices and brush with warm apricot jam for a glossy finish.

fields.name: Classic Cinnamon Rolls
fields.description: Soft fluffy rolls swirled with cinnamon sugar and topped with cream cheese icing.
fields.ingredients:
500g all-purpose flour
200ml warm milk
7g instant yeast
60g sugar
60g butter softened
2 eggs
1 tsp salt
Filling: 100g butter 150g brown sugar 2 tbsp cinnamon
Icing: 200g cream cheese 150g powdered sugar 2 tbsp milk
fields.steps:
Make the dough by combining flour yeast sugar salt milk eggs and butter then knead for 8 minutes and let rise 1 hour.
Roll dough into a rectangle spread with softened butter and sprinkle with cinnamon sugar.
Roll up tightly and cut into 12 rolls then place in a greased pan and let proof 45 minutes.
Bake at 350F for 22-25 minutes then frost with cream cheese icing while warm.

fields.name: Pecan Cinnamon Rolls
fields.description: Indulgent cinnamon rolls loaded with toasted pecans and brown sugar.
fields.ingredients:
Classic cinnamon roll dough
100g butter for filling
150g brown sugar
2 tbsp cinnamon
1 cup toasted pecans chopped
Vanilla glaze for topping
fields.steps:
Prepare cinnamon roll dough and let rise.
Roll out and spread with butter brown sugar cinnamon and pecans.
Roll up and slice into rolls then place in a greased pan and proof 45 minutes.
Bake at 350F for 22-25 minutes and drizzle with vanilla glaze.

fields.name: Chocolate Cinnamon Rolls
fields.description: Rich rolls swirled with chocolate and cinnamon topped with chocolate ganache.
fields.ingredients:
Classic cinnamon roll dough
100g butter for filling
100g dark chocolate melted
2 tbsp cinnamon
50g cocoa powder
Chocolate ganache: 100g dark chocolate 100ml cream
fields.steps:
Prepare and rise the dough then roll out into a rectangle.
Spread with butter and drizzle with melted chocolate then dust with cocoa powder and cinnamon.
Roll up tightly slice and proof in a greased pan for 45 minutes.
Bake at 350F for 22-25 minutes and top with chocolate ganache.

fields.name: Chocolate Cookies
fields.description: Chewy chocolate chip cookies with crispy edges and a soft centre.
fields.ingredients:
225g butter softened
200g brown sugar
100g caster sugar
2 eggs
1 tsp vanilla extract
300g all-purpose flour
1 tsp baking soda
1/2 tsp salt
300g chocolate chips
fields.steps:
Cream butter and sugars until light and fluffy then beat in eggs and vanilla.
Fold in flour baking soda and salt then stir in chocolate chips.
Chill dough for 30 minutes then scoop onto lined baking sheets.
Bake at 375F for 9-11 minutes until edges are set but centres are still soft.

fields.name: Butter Shortbread Biscuits
fields.description: Melt-in-your-mouth buttery shortbread with a delicate crumb.
fields.ingredients:
250g cold butter cubed
125g caster sugar
375g all-purpose flour
1/2 tsp salt
1 tsp vanilla extract
fields.steps:
Rub cold butter into flour and sugar until the mixture resembles breadcrumbs.
Add vanilla and press mixture together into a dough without overworking.
Roll to 1cm thickness cut into rectangles and prick with a fork.
Bake at 325F for 18-22 minutes until pale golden.

fields.name: Oatmeal Raisin Cookies
fields.description: Chewy warmly spiced cookies packed with oats and plump raisins.
fields.ingredients:
175g butter softened
150g brown sugar
100g caster sugar
2 eggs
1 tsp vanilla
200g all-purpose flour
1 tsp cinnamon
1/2 tsp baking soda
300g rolled oats
150g raisins
fields.steps:
Cream butter and sugars then beat in eggs and vanilla.
Mix in flour cinnamon and baking soda then stir in oats and raisins.
Scoop onto lined baking sheets and flatten slightly.
Bake at 350F for 10-12 minutes until golden at the edges.

fields.name: Glazed Donuts
fields.description: Pillowy yeasted donuts with a classic sweet vanilla glaze.
fields.ingredients:
500g all-purpose flour
200ml warm milk
7g instant yeast
60g sugar
60g butter
2 eggs
1 tsp salt
Glaze: 300g powdered sugar 4 tbsp milk 1 tsp vanilla
Oil for frying
fields.steps:
Make dough by combining all ingredients and kneading until smooth then let rise 1 hour.
Roll out to 1.5cm thick and cut into rounds then proof 45 minutes.
Fry in oil at 350F for about 1 minute per side until golden.
Dip warm donuts into the vanilla glaze and set on a rack.

fields.name: Chocolate Donuts
fields.description: Rich baked chocolate donuts with a dark chocolate glaze.
fields.ingredients:
200g all-purpose flour
60g cocoa powder
150g sugar
1 tsp baking powder
1/2 tsp salt
2 eggs
200ml buttermilk
60g melted butter
Chocolate glaze: 150g dark chocolate 100ml cream
fields.steps:
Mix dry ingredients then whisk in eggs buttermilk and melted butter.
Spoon batter into a greased donut pan filling each mould 3/4 full.
Bake at 375F for 10-12 minutes then let cool completely.
Melt chocolate and cream together and dip each donut into the ganache glaze.

fields.name: Filled Donuts
fields.description: Fluffy fried donuts filled with strawberry jam and dusted with sugar.
fields.ingredients:
Classic yeasted donut dough
Oil for frying
1 cup strawberry jam
Powdered sugar for dusting
fields.steps:
Make and rise the donut dough then cut into rounds without holes.
Proof for 45 minutes then fry in oil at 350F for 1-1.5 minutes per side.
Once cooled use a piping bag fitted with a long nozzle to inject jam into the centre.
Roll in powdered sugar and serve.

fields.name: Vanilla Macarons
fields.description: Delicate French almond meringue shells sandwiched with vanilla buttercream.
fields.ingredients:
150g almond flour
150g powdered sugar
55g aged egg whites for shells
150g caster sugar
50ml water
55g aged egg whites for meringue
Vanilla buttercream filling
fields.steps:
Sift almond flour and powdered sugar together and fold with one portion of egg whites.
Make Italian meringue by cooking sugar and water to 244F and pouring over whipped egg whites.
Fold meringue into almond mixture until batter flows like lava.
Pipe rounds onto lined sheets rest 30-60 minutes until a skin forms then bake at 300F for 13-15 minutes.
Sandwich with vanilla buttercream once cooled.

fields.name: Pistachio Macarons
fields.description: Elegant green macarons with a rich pistachio cream filling.
fields.ingredients:
150g almond flour
150g powdered sugar
55g aged egg whites
150g caster sugar
50ml water
55g aged egg whites for meringue
Green food colouring
Pistachio buttercream filling
fields.steps:
Follow the macaron shell method adding green food colouring to the almond mixture.
Pipe bake and cool the shells.
Make pistachio buttercream by blending roasted pistachios into a paste and mixing with butter and powdered sugar.
Sandwich shells with the pistachio cream.

fields.name: Raspberry Macarons
fields.description: Vibrant pink macarons filled with a tangy raspberry ganache.
fields.ingredients:
150g almond flour
150g powdered sugar
55g aged egg whites
150g caster sugar
50ml water
55g aged egg whites for meringue
Pink food colouring
Raspberry ganache: 200g white chocolate 100ml cream 2 tbsp raspberry jam
fields.steps:
Follow macaron shell method adding pink food colouring then pipe bake and cool.
Make raspberry ganache by heating cream and pouring over white chocolate then stirring in raspberry jam.
Chill ganache until pipeable.
Sandwich cooled macaron shells with the raspberry ganache.

fields.name: Tiramisu
fields.description: A classic Italian dessert with espresso-soaked ladyfingers and mascarpone cream.
fields.ingredients:
300g ladyfinger biscuits
500g mascarpone cheese
4 eggs separated
100g caster sugar
300ml strong espresso cooled
4 tbsp coffee liqueur optional
Cocoa powder for dusting
fields.steps:
Whisk egg yolks and sugar until pale then fold in mascarpone.
Whip egg whites to stiff peaks and gently fold into the mascarpone mixture.
Dip ladyfingers briefly into cooled espresso and layer in a dish.
Spread mascarpone cream over the biscuits then repeat layers.
Dust with cocoa powder and refrigerate at least 4 hours before serving.

fields.name: Black Forest Cheesecake
fields.description: A decadent cheesecake with chocolate base cherry filling and cream topping.
fields.ingredients:
200g chocolate biscuits crushed
100g butter melted
600g cream cheese
200g caster sugar
3 eggs
1 tsp vanilla
1 jar morello cherries
300ml whipping cream
fields.steps:
Mix crushed biscuits with melted butter and press into a lined springform tin then chill.
Beat cream cheese sugar eggs and vanilla until smooth then pour over base.
Bake in a water bath at 325F for 55-60 minutes then cool completely.
Top with whipped cream and drained cherries before serving.

fields.name: Brownies
fields.description: Dense fudgy chocolate brownies with a crinkly top.
fields.ingredients:
200g dark chocolate chopped
150g butter
250g caster sugar
3 eggs
1 tsp vanilla
100g all-purpose flour
30g cocoa powder
1/2 tsp salt
fields.steps:
Melt chocolate and butter together then let cool slightly.
Whisk in sugar then eggs one at a time and vanilla.
Fold in flour cocoa and salt.
Pour into a lined 20cm tin and bake at 350F for 22-25 minutes — the centre should still have a slight wobble.
Cool completely before cutting.

fields.name: Strawberry Cake
fields.description: A light vanilla sponge layered with fresh strawberries and cream.
fields.ingredients:
250g all-purpose flour
250g caster sugar
125g butter
3 eggs
1 tsp baking powder
120ml milk
1 tsp vanilla
500ml whipping cream
400g fresh strawberries
fields.steps:
Cream butter and sugar then beat in eggs and vanilla.
Fold in flour and baking powder alternating with milk.
Bake in two 20cm tins at 350F for 25-30 minutes then cool.
Whip cream to stiff peaks and slice strawberries.
Layer cake with cream and strawberries then top with more cream and whole strawberries.

fields.name: Creme Caramel
fields.description: A silky baked custard with a golden caramel sauce.
fields.ingredients:
200g caster sugar for caramel
4 tbsp water
500ml whole milk
4 eggs
2 egg yolks
100g caster sugar for custard
1 tsp vanilla extract
fields.steps:
Make caramel by cooking sugar and water until deep amber then pour into ramekins.
Warm milk with vanilla then whisk eggs egg yolks and sugar together.
Pour warm milk over egg mixture then strain and fill ramekins.
Bake in a water bath at 325F for 35-40 minutes until just set.
Chill overnight then invert onto plates to serve.

fields.name: Cupcake
fields.description: Soft vanilla cupcakes topped with swirls of buttercream frosting.
fields.ingredients:
175g butter softened
175g caster sugar
3 eggs
175g self-raising flour
1 tsp vanilla extract
2 tbsp milk
Buttercream: 250g butter 500g powdered sugar 2 tbsp milk 1 tsp vanilla
fields.steps:
Cream butter and sugar until fluffy then beat in eggs one at a time.
Fold in flour vanilla and milk.
Divide into 12 cupcake cases and bake at 350F for 18-20 minutes until springy.
Cool completely then pipe with buttercream.

fields.name: French Vanilla Cappuccino
fields.description: A creamy cappuccino with a sweet French vanilla flavour.
fields.ingredients:
2 shots espresso
200ml steamed milk
2 tbsp French vanilla syrup
Foamed milk for topping
Vanilla powder or cinnamon for garnish
fields.steps:
Pull two shots of espresso into a large cup.
Stir in French vanilla syrup.
Pour steamed milk over the espresso then spoon foamed milk on top.
Dust with vanilla powder or cinnamon.

fields.name: Caramel Hazelnut Iced Coffee
fields.description: A refreshing iced coffee with caramel and hazelnut syrups.
fields.ingredients:
2 shots espresso cooled
200ml cold milk
1 tbsp caramel syrup
1 tbsp hazelnut syrup
Ice cubes
Whipped cream optional
fields.steps:
Brew espresso and allow to cool.
Fill a tall glass with ice then add caramel and hazelnut syrups.
Pour cold milk over the ice then slowly pour cooled espresso over the top.
Stir gently and top with whipped cream if desired.

fields.name: Arab Coffee
fields.description: Traditional Arabic coffee flavoured with cardamom and saffron.
fields.ingredients:
4 cups water
4 tbsp lightly roasted ground Arabic coffee
1 tsp ground cardamom
Pinch of saffron
Dates for serving
fields.steps:
Bring water to a boil in a traditional dallah or pot.
Add ground coffee and reduce heat then simmer for 10 minutes.
Add cardamom and saffron and simmer 5 more minutes.
Strain into small cups and serve with dates.

fields.name: Berry Blast Smoothie
fields.description: A vibrant antioxidant-rich blend of mixed berries and banana.
fields.ingredients:
1 cup mixed frozen berries
1 banana
200ml almond milk or yogurt
1 tbsp honey
Handful of spinach optional
fields.steps:
Add all ingredients to a blender.
Blend on high until completely smooth.
Add more milk if the smoothie is too thick.
Pour into glasses and serve immediately.

fields.name: Pineapple Mango Smoothie
fields.description: A tropical smoothie bursting with pineapple and mango.
fields.ingredients:
1 cup frozen mango chunks
1 cup fresh or frozen pineapple
200ml coconut milk
1 tbsp lime juice
Ice cubes
fields.steps:
Add mango pineapple coconut milk and lime juice to a blender.
Blend until smooth adding ice for a thicker consistency.
Pour into glasses and garnish with a slice of pineapple.

fields.name: Strawberry Lemonade
fields.description: A refreshing sweet and tangy homemade strawberry lemonade.
fields.ingredients:
2 cups fresh strawberries hulled
Juice of 4 lemons
1/2 cup sugar
4 cups cold water
Ice and lemon slices to serve
fields.steps:
Blend strawberries until smooth then strain through a sieve.
Make a simple syrup by dissolving sugar in 1/2 cup hot water then cool.
Mix strawberry puree lemon juice simple syrup and cold water.
Pour over ice and garnish with lemon slices.

fields.name: Turkish Tea
fields.description: Strong aromatic black tea brewed in the traditional double teapot method.
fields.ingredients:
3 tbsp black tea leaves
4 cups boiling water
Sugar to taste
fields.steps:
Fill the lower kettle with water and bring to a boil.
Add tea leaves to the upper teapot and pour some boiling water over them.
Place the upper teapot on top of the lower kettle and brew for 10-15 minutes.
Pour a small amount of concentrated tea into a tulip glass then dilute with hot water to taste.

fields.name: Herbal Hibiscus Tea
fields.description: A beautiful deep red floral tea with a tart cranberry-like flavour.
fields.ingredients:
3 tbsp dried hibiscus flowers
4 cups boiling water
2 tbsp honey or sugar
Juice of 1/2 lemon
Fresh mint for garnish
fields.steps:
Place dried hibiscus flowers in a teapot or heatproof jug.
Pour boiling water over the flowers and steep for 5-7 minutes.
Strain into cups and stir in honey and lemon juice.
Garnish with fresh mint and serve hot.
